name: rabbit-spec
summary: Standalone spec-authoring skill. Comprehends user requests, judges open vs. specific intent, invokes brainstorming and/or writing-plans superpowers, updates feature specs, and writes impl-suggestion files for whatever process invoked the skill.
deprecation_criterion: When spec authoring is natively handled by the rabbit CLI or a successor skill.
spec_no_change_reason: BACKLOG-9 is a test-only item: closes invariant test gaps for Inv 2, 3, 10 — no spec edits required by impl-suggestion.
